rationale: The synthetic ensures is `P ==> det_eq(r1,r2)` and r1/r2 are unconstrained parameters, so per-run ensures are only available under P. Wrap the proof in `if P { ... }`, derive `r1.0 == r2.0` by transitivity through thread_ptr, re-assert both runs' `addr()` / `is_init()` facts to instantiate the closed-spec triggers on each side, then close PointsTo view equality with structural extensionality (`=~=`) and conclude `det_thread_to_page_equal(r1, r2)` inside the branch.
